name: 9p12_pericentromeric_satellite
description: 9p12 pericentromeric region containing massive HSat3 (human satellite 3) blocks and alpha-satellite arrays. CHM13-T2T resolved this as the largest contiguous heterochromatin block of any human chromosome; GRCh38 has it as a gap. Polymorphic in size; common 9qh+ variant frequency >1%.

architecture.internal_structure: HSat3 pentanucleotide repeat (CATTC)n megablocks plus alpha-satellite D9Z1/D9Z3 arrays plus pericentromeric SD mosaic; the largest variable satellite block in the human genome.
